subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the light of guidance! A hundred thousand mystics and sages have, through long years, endured rigorous discipline and the bitterness of tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستنیر بنور هدی صد هزار عرفا و فضلا سالهای دراز ریاضت کشیدند و زهر مشقت
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @monasticism; asceticism
